message:
fix(workflow): correct bun global install syntax from 'install -g' to 'add -g'

bun install doesn't accept package names as arguments - it reads from
package.json. The correct command for global package installation is
'bun add -g {package}'.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
